use_cases: Primary call-to-action button on landing pages and hero sections
Action triggers in forms and modals
Navigation action buttons in web applications
Premium UI button for SaaS and tech product interfaces
ai_summary: A premium animated CTA button featuring a rotating conic gradient border with glowing blue highlights against a dark background. The button includes smooth cubic-bezier transitions, pill-shaped styling, and hover glow effects. Built with CSS custom properties for easy theming, making it ideal for modern SaaS products, landing pages, and tech-focused interfaces requiring attention-grabbing action triggers.
